name: dewott
flavor_texts: Strict training is how it learns its flowing double-scalchop technique.
Scalchop techniques differ from one Dewott to another. It never neglects maintaining its scalchops.
As a result of strict training, each Dewott learns different forms for using the scalchops.
Its exquisite double-scalchop technique is likely the result of daily training, and it can send even masters of the blade fleeing in defeat.
text: Dewott is the Discipline Pokémon. It is a water-type Pokémon. Abilities: torrent, shell-armor (hidden). Base stats — HP: 75, Attack: 75, Defense: 60, Sp. Atk: 83, Sp. Def: 60, Speed: 60. Evolution line: oshawott → dewott → samurott. Lore: Strict training is how it learns its flowing double-scalchop technique. Scalchop techniques differ from one Dewott to another. It never neglects maintaining its scalchops. As a result of strict training, each Dewott learns different forms for using the scalchops. Its exquisite double-scalchop technique is likely the result of daily training, and it can send even masters of the blade fleeing in defeat.
